note: Yosys OSS does not accept SVA `property ... endproperty`. A Verilog-2001 compatible formal wrapper was authored that re-expresses the four named properties using inline assert + history registers. Semantics are equivalent under the `disable iff (!rst_n)` clause (encoded via a reset-sequence assume: cycle 0 !rst_n, cycles 1+ rst_n).

cover.name: c_ovf_reachable
cover.note: cover run not required for Module Graduation

acceptance_criteria_met: REQ-U-003.AC-1: skeleton with 4 named properties exists (+2 covers)
REQ-U-003.AC-2: all bound assertions pass under SymbiYosys BMC depth >= 20 (ran depth 30) AND k-induction depth 20 (stronger than AC requires)
